column1: No data were collected for Q2 to Q4 2020 due to the coronavirus (COVID-19) pandemic. Estimates are based on models using passenger numbers and IPS trend data
Data for 2021 are shown for UK residents who travelled abroad by air. Insufficient data were collected to provide robust estimates for sea and tunnel.
Percentage differences between Q1 2020 and Q1 2021 are provided using air data only although figures shown in the table for 2020 include all modes
